     The Numbers Business Report

American Underdog: The Kurt Warner Story (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,514,814Details
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $902,680
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,818,192
Total $2,720,872
Further financial details...

Synopsis

American Underdog tells the inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who went from a stockboy at a grocery store to a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. The film centers on Warner’s unique story and years of challenges and setbacks that could have derailed his aspirations to become an NFL player — but just when his dreams seemed all but out of reach, it is only with the support of his wife, Brenda and the encouragement of his family, coaches, and teammates that Warner perseveres and finds the strength to show the world the champion that he already is. American Underdog is an uplifting story that demonstrates that anything is possible when you have faith, family and determination.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,861,836 (22.1% of total gross)
Legs:4.52 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:100.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,813 opening theaters/2,813 max. theaters, 6.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $30,606,644

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2021 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: December 25th, 2021 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: February 4th, 2022 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some language and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2705 (cert #53319), 11/3/2021)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Plot point: Biography, Football, Inspirational Sports, Underdog
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Subgenre: Sports Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Time period setting: 1990s, 2000s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Kingdom Story Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

American Underdog tells the inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who went from a stockboy at a grocery store to a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. The film centers on Warner’s unique story and years of challenges and setbacks that could have derailed his aspirations to become an NFL player — but just when his dreams seemed all but out of reach, it is only with the support of his wife, Brenda and the encouragement of his family, coaches, and teammates that Warner perseveres and finds the strength to show the world the champion that he already is. American Underdog is an uplifting story that demonstrates that anything is possible when you have faith, family and determination.
